message: ODUS (ODU_DETALHADO) already exists at traducao-areas.ts:123-247 covering all 9 areas (saude, trabalho, amor, sexualidade, criacao, proposito, familia, espiritualidade, superacao). Task premise of 'Missing: ODUS' is incorrect. The file's actual pattern uses {explicacao, convergencia, tensao, evitar, pratica} (+ requer_terreiro for ODU), not the {name, keywords, contextPatterns} schema described in the task. ASTROLOGIA_DETALHADO uses the same pattern as ODU/CABALA/TANTRA/ICHING. No-op performed: no duplicate added, no commit made.

findings.conclusion: Task is a no-op; ODUS already fully present in committed file. Adding a second ODUS section with the wrong schema would corrupt the curated structure.
